# Crox

> AI integration for businesses. We connect AI assistants to your existing tools using the Model Context Protocol (MCP).

## What We Do

Crox helps businesses connect AI systems like Claude and ChatGPT to their existing software — CRMs, accounting tools, project management, communication platforms — using the Model Context Protocol. We build custom MCP servers, handle implementation, and ensure security and compliance.

## Services

- **AI Integration**: Connect AI assistants to your business tools via MCP. Custom MCP server development for proprietary systems, legacy databases, and SaaS platforms.
- **MCP Server Directory**: Reference guide to 20+ MCP servers for tools like Slack, HubSpot, Salesforce, Xero, GitHub, Stripe, and more.
- **Consulting**: Strategy and implementation guidance for AI adoption in regulated industries including accounting, legal, and finance.

## About

Founded by Adam Field. 10+ years building and deploying machine learning systems in regulated environments. Former AI product leader at Babylon Health (clinical AI across 12 countries), Health Navigator (NHS readmission reduction), and Forward Partners (FinTech scoring systems). Currently Head of Product at SideLight AI. Based in London, UK.
